meaning: adj.意外的,非主要的,附属的n.非本质属性,次要方面
examples: The coroner recorded a verdict of accidental death.
We insure against all damage, accidental or otherwise.
At least 10 000 children are involved in accidental poisonings every year.
It was just an accidental bang to my arm but the pain was excruciating.
At times Parcher's courtroom tricks are accidental, or so he would have you believe.
